SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-16-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes befor the court on this day having been sent forthwith from department 206 foer a small claims appeal. The udge, Clerk, Denis D. Vegas, Plaintiff/Respondant Tera Molina, Defendant/Appellant Isidro Sanzeardo are present in court. Court and parties disciss the matter off of the record. Judgement is awarded in favor of plaintiff Molina, and against defendant Isidro Saenzpardo in the amount of $970.00.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-11-2009 Judgment Entered
